pr_title: Fix SQL injection in query builder
diff:
diff --git a/app/db.py b/app/db.py
--- a/app/db.py
+++ b/app/db.py
@@ -10,3 +10,4 @@
 def query(user_input):
-    return db.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{user_input}'")
+    return db.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = %s", (user_input,))

expected_comments.description: SQL injection vulnerability — user input directly interpolated into query string
